uniques: Will not be displayed in Civilopedia

name: Staff Office
uniques: Only available <if [Headquarters] is constructed in all [non-[Puppeted]] cities>
Cost increases by [30] per owned city

name: Change Mobilization Level
uniques: Remove [Change Mobilization Level] [in this city] <hidden from users>

name: Propaganda News
uniques: Only available <when number of [Commands] is more than [49]>

name: Propaganda Broadcasts
uniques: Only available <if [Bloadcast Tower] is constructed> <when number of [Commands] is more than [99]>

name: Recruiting Campaign
uniques: Only available <when number of [Commands] is more than [9]>

name: Conscription for 10 turns
uniques: Only available <if [Conscription for 20 turns] is not constructed>
Only available <when number of [Commands] is more than [14]>
Remove [Conscription for 10 turns] [in this city] <for every [10] [turns]>

name: Conscription for 20 turns
uniques: Only available <if [Conscription for 10 turns] is not constructed>
Only available <when number of [Commands] is more than [29]>
Remove [Conscription for 20 turns] [in this city] <for every [20] [turns]>

name: Expand Rifle Factory
uniques: [-1]% Production when constructing [Expand Rifle Factory] buildings [in this city] <for every [100*(1-25/[Production])]>
